title: APM: CSRF Token Missing or Invalid on State-Changing Request
description: Detects HTTP POST/PUT/DELETE requests to state-changing endpoints that lack CSRF tokens or have invalid tokens, indicating potential Cross-Site Request Forgery. Uses APM span attributes to detect missing security headers.
query: ('Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' or 'Log Source' = 'octo-drone-shop' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs') and ((('HTTP Method' = 'POST' or 'HTTP Method' = 'PUT' or 'HTTP Method' = 'DELETE' or 'HTTP Method' = 'PATCH')) and (Referer is null) and not (('HTTP URL' like '*/api/health*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*/api/status*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*/login*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*/oauth*' or 'HTTP URL' like '*/webhook*')))
